implemented_equations.least_squares: raw PTM estimate from linear inversion QPT
implemented_equations.pls_projection: min ||J - J_LS||_F over J >= 0 and Tr_output J = I

assumptions: The reproduction uses a single-qubit process so the projection is transparent and fast.
The primary benchmark uses finite-shot noise without SPAM bias.
CPTP projection is implemented by Dykstra alternating projections.
The purpose is physical reconstruction, not proving the statistical rates from the paper.
